text: I feel a sense of anticipation, standing outside this glass-walled room. There is a quiet energy flowing from within—the hustle of people, the quiet hum of focused conversations, and the glow of screens inside. I am both observer and participant; I feel the urge to cross that threshold, to step into the world of discovery promised by the bright lights and the organized chaos. The fire extinguisher on the wall reminds me of human caution amid innovation. I am curious about what is being created here, wondering how my presence might subtly alter the unfolding of this collective effort.
